content:
Hi Ed9213

K9 Mail and Thunderbird for Android are essentially the same app.

They're built from the same code base and have only minor differences such as color scheme. TB for Android provides an additional feature to help users import their accounts from Thunderbird desktop. See here for more information.

You can have both apps installed at the same time if you'd like to compare them. Thunderbird for android allows you to import your settings directly from K9.

Neither K9 or Thunderbird offer any rule based filtering.

The community have suggested the feature addition on Mozilla connect. You can show support by voting for the idea linked below.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/filtering-with-android-thunderbird/idi-p/61144
creator: platform34
